title: Forest throws for vibe
description: A few new forest dungeons in your world
body:
# RU                                                               

Ничего особенно, только новые данжи для разнообразия ваших лесных биомов и не только. Таких как:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d966cf6857be98146160d1bf1f4430c8d450d11_0.webp)
Пожарная вышка. Большой данж в тайге который словно недавно кто то покинул.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3cdd8b47d298a83a5b5c66540194c1c39e18d77.png)
Лесной домик. Небольшой дом отстроенный в глуши леса.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e0ea51b30f51f69d058488618c3206393a0f5dd_0.webp)
Смотровая башня. Маленькое строение сооруженное для наблюдения в жарких пустынях.


</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eeb045b4419c2f5b63f23af5e12c78d1affb9616_0.webp)
Водонапорная башня. Очень строе водохранилище.

</details>


# ENG

Nothing special, just new dungeons to diversify your forest biomes and more.
                                                              
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d966cf6857be98146160d1bf1f4430c8d450d11_0.webp)
The fire tower. A large dungeon in the taiga that seems to have recently been abandoned.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3cdd8b47d298a83a5b5c66540194c1c39e18d77.png)
Forest house. A small house built in the middle of the forest.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e0ea51b30f51f69d058488618c3206393a0f5dd_0.webp)
The observation tower. A small building built for observation in hot deserts.


</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eeb045b4419c2f5b63f23af5e12c78d1affb9616_0.webp)
The water tower. The reservoir is very strict.

</details>
